materials.title: Work / Study
materials.passage: I currently work as a product manager. My job mainly involves communicating with different teams, trying to understand users' needs, and finding ways to improve user experience. What I like most about my work is that it allows me to solve real problems, which gives me a strong sense of achievement. To be honest, my work can be quite demanding sometimes. I often have to deal with tight deadlines, unexpected changes, and different opinions from different people. However, these challenges have helped me become more patient and organized. One important thing I've learned from my work is how to think from the user's perspective. I believe a good product should make people's lives easier. In the future, I hope to take on more responsibility and keep improving my communication and problem-solving skills.
expressions: communicate with different teams：和不同团队沟通
understand users' needs：理解用户需求
improve user experience：改善用户体验
solve real problems：解决真实问题
a strong sense of achievement：强烈的成就感
quite demanding：要求很高 / 挺累人的
become more patient and organized：变得更有耐心、更有条理
from the user's perspective：从用户角度
take on more responsibility：承担更多责任
replacements: product manager → student / designer / teacher / office worker / internet worker
improve user experience → improve my learning efficiency / improve customer service
tight deadlines → heavy workload / difficult assignments / exam pressure
from the user's perspective → from the customer's perspective / from other people's perspective

sentences.text: I currently work as a product manager.
My job mainly involves communicating with different teams, trying to understand users' needs, and finding ways to improve user experience.
What I like most about my work is that it allows me to solve real problems, which gives me a strong sense of achievement.
To be honest, my work can be quite demanding sometimes.
I often have to deal with tight deadlines, unexpected changes, and different opinions from different people.
However, these challenges have helped me become more patient and organized.
One important thing I've learned from my work is how to think from the user's perspective.
I believe a good product should make people's lives easier.
In the future, I hope to take on more responsibility and keep improving my communication and problem-solving skills.

materials.title: Hometown
materials.passage: I was born and raised in a city with a long history. It has a rich cultural atmosphere, and at the same time, it is quite modern and convenient. There is convenient public transport, many restaurants serving local food, and some famous historical buildings. What I like most about my hometown is the sense of belonging it gives me. I have many childhood memories there, so whenever I go back, I feel emotionally connected to the place. It is familiar, warm, and meaningful to me. Over the past few years, my hometown has changed a lot. There are more tall buildings, more business areas, and more young people moving there for work. Of course, the cost of living has also become higher. Still, I think it is a great place to live because it is convenient, lively, and full of memories.
expressions: be born and raised in：出生并成长于
a city with a long history：一座历史悠久的城市
rich cultural atmosphere：浓厚的文化氛围
convenient public transport：便利的公共交通
feel emotionally connected to：对……有情感连接
over the past few years：过去几年
a great place to live：适合居住的地方
replacements: a city with a long history → a small town / a modern city / a coastal city
local food → traditional snacks / street food / spicy food
historical buildings → old streets / temples / museums
cost of living → housing price / traffic pressure / population density

sentences.text: I was born and raised in a city with a long history.
It has a rich cultural atmosphere, and at the same time, it is quite modern and convenient.
There is convenient public transport, many restaurants serving local food, and some famous historical buildings.
What I like most about my hometown is the sense of belonging it gives me.
I have many childhood memories there, so whenever I go back, I feel emotionally connected to the place.
It is familiar, warm, and meaningful to me.
Over the past few years, my hometown has changed a lot.
There are more tall buildings, more business areas, and more young people moving there for work.
Of course, the cost of living has also become higher.
Still, I think it is a great place to live because it is convenient, lively, and full of memories.

materials.title: Home / Accommodation
materials.passage: I currently live in an apartment with my family. It is not very big, but it is comfortable enough for our daily life. The apartment is in a convenient area, and the nearby facilities are quite good. For example, there are supermarkets and subway stations close to my home. My favourite room is the living room. I spend most of my time there reading, talking with my family, or just doing nothing. I like its cozy atmosphere, especially in the evening, when I can relax after a long day. I prefer a simple and practical home. If I could change one thing, I would like to have more natural light and a bigger study room. For me, home is a kind of personal space where I can feel safe and peaceful and recharge myself.
expressions: live in an apartment：住在公寓
supermarkets and subway stations：超市和地铁站
spend most of my time：花大部分时间
relax after a long day：忙碌一天后放松
feel safe and peaceful：感到安全和平静
replacements: apartment → house / rented flat / dormitory
living room → bedroom / study room / balcony
convenient area → quiet area / central area / residential area
more natural light → more space / better decoration / a larger kitchen

sentences.text: I currently live in an apartment with my family.
It is not very big, but it is comfortable enough for our daily life.
The apartment is in a convenient area, and the nearby facilities are quite good.
For example, there are supermarkets and subway stations close to my home.
My favourite room is the living room.
I spend most of my time there reading, talking with my family, or just doing nothing.
I like its cozy atmosphere, especially in the evening, when I can relax after a long day.
I prefer a simple and practical home.
If I could change one thing, I would like to have more natural light and a bigger study room.
For me, home is a kind of personal space where I can feel safe and peaceful and recharge myself.

materials.title: Family
materials.passage: I have a small but close family. We don't always express feelings directly, but we care about each other deeply. My parents have a strong influence on me, especially in terms of family values. They taught me to be responsible and independent. I try to spend quality time with my family on weekends. Sometimes we have dinner together, take a walk, or talk about ordinary things. These simple moments give me a lot of emotional support. Of course, family members may have different opinions sometimes. I think the key is to be patient with each other, understand each other, and build trust slowly. In my opinion, a healthy family relationship should make people feel accepted. Family is also where people can experience unconditional love.
expressions: a small but close family：小而亲密的家庭
express feelings directly：直接表达感受
care about each other deeply：深深关心彼此
have a strong influence on me：对我影响很大
be responsible and independent：负责且独立
be patient with each other：彼此耐心
healthy family relationship：健康的家庭关系
replacements: parents → wife / husband / child / grandparents
spend quality time → have meals together / travel together / talk before bedtime
emotional support → practical help / a sense of safety / encouragement
different opinions → small conflicts / different habits / communication problems

sentences.text: I have a small but close family.
We don't always express feelings directly, but we care about each other deeply.
My parents have a strong influence on me, especially in terms of family values.
They taught me to be responsible and independent.
I try to spend quality time with my family on weekends.
Sometimes we have dinner together, take a walk, or talk about ordinary things.
These simple moments give me a lot of emotional support.
Of course, family members may have different opinions sometimes.
I think the key is to be patient with each other, understand each other, and build trust slowly.
In my opinion, a healthy family relationship should make people feel accepted.
Family is also where people can experience unconditional love.

materials.title: Friends
materials.passage: I have a few close friends rather than a large social circle. For me, friendship is about building meaningful relationships with people who are trustworthy and supportive. My best friend and I stay in touch regularly. We share similar values and have some common interests, such as reading, work, and life planning. He is a reliable friend. When I go through difficult moments, he can listen patiently and give honest advice. I believe friendship requires mutual respect. Although online communication is convenient, face-to-face communication is still important because it makes the relationship feel warmer. To keep a friendship alive, people need time, honesty, and patience. A true friend is someone who can understand me without judging me.
expressions: a few close friends：几个亲密朋友
a large social circle：很大的社交圈
trustworthy and supportive：值得信任且支持人的
share similar values：有相似价值观
go through difficult moments：经历困难时刻
keep a friendship alive：维持友谊
replacements: best friend → old classmate / colleague / childhood friend
common interests → sports / movies / travelling / parenting
difficult moments → work pressure / personal problems / emotional stress
face-to-face communication → phone calls / online messages / video chats

sentences.text: I have a few close friends rather than a large social circle.
For me, friendship is about building meaningful relationships with people who are trustworthy and supportive.
My best friend and I stay in touch regularly.
We share similar values and have some common interests, such as reading, work, and life planning.
He is a reliable friend.
When I go through difficult moments, he can listen patiently and give honest advice.
I believe friendship requires mutual respect.
Although online communication is convenient, face-to-face communication is still important because it makes the relationship feel warmer.
To keep a friendship alive, people need time, honesty, and patience.
A true friend is someone who can understand me without judging me.

materials.title: Daily Routine
materials.passage: My daily routine is quite regular. I usually get up at around seven and start my day with a simple breakfast. Before work, I often make a rough plan so that I know what I need to do. During the day, I mainly deal with work tasks. I try to manage my time well and stay focused, although it is not always easy. In the evening, I usually wind down by reading, walking, or spending time with my family. Recently, I've been trying to use my phone less and build healthier habits. I think a good routine can help me avoid wasting time, stay productive, and feel more balanced. More importantly, it gives me a sense of control over my life.
expressions: get up at around seven：大约七点起床
make a rough plan：做一个大致计划
deal with work tasks：处理工作任务
use my phone less：少用手机
build healthier habits：建立更健康的习惯
avoid wasting time：避免浪费时间
replacements: work tasks → study tasks / housework / meetings / emails
reading → listening to music / jogging / watching a show
use my phone less → sleep earlier / exercise more / eat healthier food
a sense of control → a sense of stability / a better mood / more energy

sentences.text: My daily routine is quite regular.
I usually get up at around seven and start my day with a simple breakfast.
Before work, I often make a rough plan so that I know what I need to do.
During the day, I mainly deal with work tasks.
I try to manage my time well and stay focused, although it is not always easy.
In the evening, I usually wind down by reading, walking, or spending time with my family.
Recently, I've been trying to use my phone less and build healthier habits.
I think a good routine can help me avoid wasting time, stay productive, and feel more balanced.
More importantly, it gives me a sense of control over my life.

materials.title: Food
materials.passage: I am interested in food, and I enjoy trying different kinds of food. I especially like spicy food because it usually has a rich flavour and makes me feel satisfied. However, I try not to eat too much oily food, because these days I pay more attention to health. On weekdays, I usually eat simple meals made with fresh ingredients. I think home-cooked food is usually healthier, and it helps me maintain a balanced diet. I also try to avoid overeating, although it is difficult when the food is really delicious. For me, food is connected with memory and culture. A local speciality can help me understand a place, and some dishes are like comfort food because they remind me of home. I also believe food can bring people together, because people often have good conversations while eating.
expressions: be interested in food：对食物感兴趣
try different kinds of food：尝试不同食物
pay more attention to health：更关注健康
comfort food：让人感到安慰的食物
bring people together：把人聚在一起
replacements: spicy food → seafood / noodles / hot pot / vegetarian food
oily food → fried food / sweet food / processed food
home-cooked food → restaurant food / street food / school meals
local speciality → traditional snack / famous dish / family recipe

sentences.text: I am interested in food, and I enjoy trying different kinds of food.
I especially like spicy food because it usually has a rich flavour and makes me feel satisfied.
However, I try not to eat too much oily food, because these days I pay more attention to health.
On weekdays, I usually eat simple meals made with fresh ingredients.
I think home-cooked food is usually healthier, and it helps me maintain a balanced diet.
I also try to avoid overeating, although it is difficult when the food is really delicious.
For me, food is connected with memory and culture.
A local speciality can help me understand a place, and some dishes are like comfort food because they remind me of home.
I also believe food can bring people together, because people often have good conversations while eating.

materials.title: Health / Exercise
materials.passage: I think good health is one of the most important things in life. I'm not a professional athlete, but I try to stay active, exercise regularly, and stay consistent. My favourite form of exercise is jogging. It is simple and convenient, and I can do it almost anywhere. Jogging helps me reduce stress, stay energetic, and improve sleep quality. I also believe exercise is good for mental health. Besides jogging, I sometimes do some strength training to build up physical strength. I think people should avoid a sedentary lifestyle, especially if they work in an office. Recently, I've been trying to build a healthier lifestyle. I believe small habits can make a big difference over time.
expressions: one of the most important things：最重要的事情之一
my favourite form of exercise：我最喜欢的运动形式
improve sleep quality：改善睡眠质量
build up physical strength：增强体力
avoid a sedentary lifestyle：避免久坐生活方式
healthier lifestyle：更健康的生活方式
small habits can make a big difference：小习惯能带来大改变
replacements: jogging → swimming / walking / cycling / climbing stairs
reduce stress → clear my mind / relax my body / improve my mood
strength training → stretching / yoga / ball games
sedentary lifestyle → unhealthy lifestyle / irregular routine / stressful life

sentences.text: I think good health is one of the most important things in life.
I'm not a professional athlete, but I try to stay active, exercise regularly, and stay consistent.
My favourite form of exercise is jogging.
It is simple and convenient, and I can do it almost anywhere.
Jogging helps me reduce stress, stay energetic, and improve sleep quality.
I also believe exercise is good for mental health.
Besides jogging, I sometimes do some strength training to build up physical strength.
I think people should avoid a sedentary lifestyle, especially if they work in an office.
Recently, I've been trying to build a healthier lifestyle.
I believe small habits can make a big difference over time.

materials.title: Technology
materials.passage: Technology plays an important role in my daily life. I rely on technology quite a lot, and I use many digital tools every day. For example, I use my phone and computer to communicate with others, work, relax, and do online learning. One technology I use a lot is artificial intelligence. It helps me organize information, save time, and improve efficiency. In many ways, technology can make life more convenient. However, technology also has some problems. We may face information overload, and digital devices can be distracting. Many people spend too much time looking at screens. So I think we should use technology wisely. Technology should serve people and help us live better, rather than control our attention all the time.
expressions: play an important role：扮演重要角色
make life more convenient：让生活更方便
use technology wisely：明智使用科技
replacements: artificial intelligence → smartphones / computers / online payment / navigation apps
organize information → search for information / translate languages / manage tasks
information overload → screen addiction / privacy problems / fake news
use technology wisely → control screen time / choose reliable information / stay focused

sentences.text: Technology plays an important role in my daily life.
I rely on technology quite a lot, and I use many digital tools every day.
For example, I use my phone and computer to communicate with others, work, relax, and do online learning.
One technology I use a lot is artificial intelligence.
It helps me organize information, save time, and improve efficiency.
In many ways, technology can make life more convenient.
However, technology also has some problems.
We may face information overload, and digital devices can be distracting.
Many people spend too much time looking at screens.
So I think we should use technology wisely.
Technology should serve people and help us live better, rather than control our attention all the time.

materials.title: Internet / Social Media
materials.displayTitle: 10. Internet / Social Media｜网络与社交媒体
materials.passage: I use the internet every day. I usually use it to search for information, watch videos, learn new things, and keep in touch with friends. Without the internet, my life would be much less convenient. Social media has changed the way people communicate. It allows people to share opinions and experiences with others. It can also help people build an online community around shared interests, such as books, sports, or technology. However, I think social media is a double-edged sword. It is useful, but it can also waste a lot of time. There is also a lot of unreliable information online, so we should be careful about what we read and share. In my opinion, using the internet requires self-control. I try to limit screen time and spend more time on real-life communication.
expressions: use the internet every day：每天使用互联网
keep in touch with friends：和朋友保持联系
share opinions and experiences：分享观点和经历
waste a lot of time：浪费很多时间
be careful about what we read and share：谨慎对待阅读和分享的内容
limit screen time：限制屏幕时间
replacements: social media → short-video apps / online forums / messaging apps
shared interests → parenting / reading / fitness / movies
waste a lot of time → distract people / affect sleep / reduce concentration
real-life communication → face-to-face talks / family time / outdoor activities

sentences.text: I use the internet every day.
I usually use it to search for information, watch videos, learn new things, and keep in touch with friends.
Without the internet, my life would be much less convenient.
Social media has changed the way people communicate.
It allows people to share opinions and experiences with others.
It can also help people build an online community around shared interests, such as books, sports, or technology.
However, I think social media is a double-edged sword.
It is useful, but it can also waste a lot of time.
There is also a lot of unreliable information online, so we should be careful about what we read and share.
In my opinion, using the internet requires self-control.
I try to limit screen time and spend more time on real-life communication.

materials.title: Books / Reading
materials.passage: I enjoy reading because it helps me think more deeply. I don't read as much as I should, but I try to read regularly. My favourite types of books are psychology,, history,, and philosophy books, because they help me understand myself better. Reading gives me a chance to slow down. These days, people spend a lot of time watching short videos, but books require more patience. At the same time, they can give us deeper knowledge and meaningful ideas. I usually read during quiet moments, especially before going to bed. I prefer books that are practical and thought-provoking. A good book can change the way I see the world and help me gain new perspectives. I think reading is a lifelong habit worth developing.
expressions: think more deeply：更深入地思考
psychology, history, and philosophy：心理学、历史和哲学
require more patience：需要更多耐心
practical and thought-provoking：实用且引人深思
change the way I see the world：改变我看世界的方式
replacements: psychology, history, and philosophy → business / science / novels / biographies
before going to bed → on weekends / during lunch breaks / when I'm alone
practical and thought-provoking → relaxing and interesting / useful and inspiring
reading → listening to audiobooks / taking online courses / writing notes

sentences.text: I enjoy reading because it helps me think more deeply.
I don't read as much as I should, but I try to read regularly.
My favourite types of books are psychology,, history,, and philosophy books, because they help me understand myself better.
Reading gives me a chance to slow down.
These days, people spend a lot of time watching short videos, but books require more patience.
At the same time, they can give us deeper knowledge and meaningful ideas.
I usually read during quiet moments, especially before going to bed.
I prefer books that are practical and thought-provoking.
A good book can change the way I see the world and help me gain new perspectives.
I think reading is a lifelong habit worth developing.

materials.title: Movies / TV Shows
materials.displayTitle: 12. Movies / TV Shows｜电影与电视剧
materials.passage: I enjoy watching movies and TV shows in my free time because they help me relax after a busy day. My favourite type is drama, because it often shows human relationships and personal growth. I also like science fiction because it is imaginative. In my opinion, a good movie should have an interesting story, believable characters, and emotional depth. Some movies have a strong emotional impact, so they can make people think about life in a different way. I don't like films that are too predictable, because they are less exciting. A really good movie can stay in my mind for a long time. I usually watch movies at home, but going to the cinema feels more immersive because of the big screen and sound effects. I think movies are both entertainment and a form of art.
expressions: in my free time：空闲时间
relax after a busy day：忙碌一天后放松
stay in my mind：留在我脑海里
a form of art：一种艺术形式
replacements: drama → comedy / action movies / documentaries / cartoons
science fiction → historical films / family movies / crime stories
emotional depth → good acting / beautiful music / realistic details
cinema → home theater / streaming platform / movie app

sentences.text: I enjoy watching movies and TV shows in my free time because they help me relax after a busy day.
My favourite type is drama, because it often shows human relationships and personal growth.
I also like science fiction because it is imaginative.
In my opinion, a good movie should have an interesting story, believable characters, and emotional depth.
Some movies have a strong emotional impact, so they can make people think about life in a different way.
I don't like films that are too predictable, because they are less exciting.
A really good movie can stay in my mind for a long time.
I usually watch movies at home, but going to the cinema feels more immersive because of the big screen and sound effects.
I think movies are both entertainment and a form of art.

materials.title: Travel / Holidays
materials.passage: I enjoy travelling because it allows me to experience a different lifestyle. My favourite kind of trip is a relaxing trip with my family, because it gives us a chance to spend quality time together. I prefer places with natural scenery and local culture. I like to walk around a city, try local food, and observe how local people live. For me, travel is not just about visiting famous tourist attractions. It is also about learning to enjoy the journey and get away from daily stress. Before travelling, I usually make a rough plan, but I don't like a tight schedule. I prefer slow travel, because it makes me feel more relaxed. In my opinion, travel can broaden our minds and help us understand different ways of life.
expressions: experience a different lifestyle：体验不同生活方式
walk around a city：在城市里走走
try local food：尝试本地食物
get away from daily stress：逃离日常压力
make a rough plan：做一个大致计划
replacements: travelling → visiting museums / going camping / taking a short holiday
natural scenery → beaches / mountains / parks / old towns
local culture → local history / local customs / local lifestyle
slow travel → family travel / independent travel / budget travel

sentences.text: I enjoy travelling because it allows me to experience a different lifestyle.
My favourite kind of trip is a relaxing trip with my family, because it gives us a chance to spend quality time together.
I prefer places with natural scenery and local culture.
I like to walk around a city, try local food, and observe how local people live.
For me, travel is not just about visiting famous tourist attractions.
It is also about learning to enjoy the journey and get away from daily stress.
Before travelling, I usually make a rough plan, but I don't like a tight schedule.
I prefer slow travel, because it makes me feel more relaxed.
In my opinion, travel can broaden our minds and help us understand different ways of life.

materials.title: Shopping
materials.passage: I usually shop online because it is convenient and time-saving. I often buy daily necessities, books, and electronic products online. Compared with physical stores, online shopping can offer more choices and sometimes better prices. Before buying something, I usually compare prices and read reviews. Reviews help me make better decisions, because I can learn from other people's experience. I also care more about quality than brand, and I prefer products that are practical and durable. However, online shopping may encourage people to buy things impulsively, especially when products are on sale. So I try to think twice before making a purchase. In my opinion, a good product should be useful, reliable, and good value for money.
expressions: convenient and time-saving：方便且省时间
offer more choices：提供更多选择
make better decisions：做出更好的决定
care more about quality：更关注质量
good value for money：性价比高
replacements: shop online → shop in physical stores / buy things from apps / order products online
daily necessities → clothes / food / gifts / books
electronic products → headphones / computers / home appliances
think twice → set a budget / compare different brands / avoid unnecessary purchases

sentences.text: I usually shop online because it is convenient and time-saving.
I often buy daily necessities, books, and electronic products online.
Compared with physical stores, online shopping can offer more choices and sometimes better prices.
Before buying something, I usually compare prices and read reviews.
Reviews help me make better decisions, because I can learn from other people's experience.
I also care more about quality than brand, and I prefer products that are practical and durable.
However, online shopping may encourage people to buy things impulsively, especially when products are on sale.
So I try to think twice before making a purchase.
In my opinion, a good product should be useful, reliable, and good value for money.

materials.title: Weather / Seasons
materials.passage: My favourite season is autumn. The weather is usually cool and comfortable, and I really enjoy this kind of mild weather. I don't like weather that is extremely hot or cold. In autumn, the fresh air makes outdoor activities more enjoyable. Good weather can put me in a good mood, and sunny days often make me feel more energetic. On the other hand, rainy days sometimes make me feel a bit lazy, especially when I have to go out. I think weather can influence daily plans. For example, people may change their travel plans because of heavy rain. In recent years, the weather has become less predictable, probably because of climate change. So I think people should pay more attention to environmental protection.
expressions: extremely hot or cold：极热或极冷
put me in a good mood：让我心情好
feel more energetic：感觉更有精力
feel a bit lazy：感觉有点懒
influence daily plans：影响日常计划
replacements: autumn → spring / summer / winter
cool and comfortable → warm and sunny / dry and pleasant / cold but beautiful
outdoor activities → walking / jogging / cycling / travelling
rainy days → snowy days / hot days / windy days

sentences.text: My favourite season is autumn.
The weather is usually cool and comfortable, and I really enjoy this kind of mild weather.
I don't like weather that is extremely hot or cold.
In autumn, the fresh air makes outdoor activities more enjoyable.
Good weather can put me in a good mood, and sunny days often make me feel more energetic.
On the other hand, rainy days sometimes make me feel a bit lazy, especially when I have to go out.
I think weather can influence daily plans.
For example, people may change their travel plans because of heavy rain.
In recent years, the weather has become less predictable, probably because of climate change.
So I think people should pay more attention to environmental protection.

materials.title: Education / Learning
materials.passage: I think learning is a lifelong process. School education is important because it gives people basic knowledge and social skills. At the same time, self-learning is also necessary, especially in modern society, where things change very quickly. In my opinion, a good teacher can make a subject more interesting. I learn better when I understand the purpose of learning and can connect knowledge with real life. Memorization is useful sometimes, but real understanding is more important. These days, online learning has become popular. It gives people more flexibility, because they can learn anytime and anywhere. However, it also requires self-discipline. I believe the most important ability is learning how to learn, because this ability can help people keep growing throughout life.
expressions: make a subject more interesting：让一门课更有趣
connect knowledge with real life：把知识和现实生活连接起来
learning how to learn：学会学习
replacements: school education → university education / family education / language learning
self-learning → reading books / taking online courses / learning from practice
a good teacher → a good parent / a good coach / a good mentor
online learning → classroom learning / group learning / one-on-one tutoring

sentences.text: I think learning is a lifelong process.
School education is important because it gives people basic knowledge and social skills.
At the same time, self-learning is also necessary, especially in modern society, where things change very quickly.
In my opinion, a good teacher can make a subject more interesting.
I learn better when I understand the purpose of learning and can connect knowledge with real life.
Memorization is useful sometimes, but real understanding is more important.
These days, online learning has become popular.
It gives people more flexibility, because they can learn anytime and anywhere.
However, it also requires self-discipline.
I believe the most important ability is learning how to learn, because this ability can help people keep growing throughout life.

materials.title: Environment
materials.passage: I think environmental protection is very important because it is closely connected with our health and future. In many cities, air pollution, plastic waste, and traffic-related pollution have become serious problems. People's daily choices can have an impact on the environment. For example, we can use less plastic, save electricity, recycle more, and take public transport instead of driving alone. These actions may look small, but they still matter. Of course, individuals cannot solve all environmental problems alone. Governments should make stricter rules to reduce pollution, and companies should take more social responsibility. At the same time, ordinary people should build a more sustainable lifestyle. Protecting the environment means helping to protect our future.
expressions: have an impact on：对……有影响
take public transport：乘坐公共交通
protect our future：保护我们的未来
replacements: air pollution → water pollution / noise pollution / climate problems
use less plastic → bring reusable bags / avoid disposable products / save water
take public transport → walk more / cycle more / drive less
companies → schools / communities / families

sentences.text: I think environmental protection is very important because it is closely connected with our health and future.
In many cities, air pollution, plastic waste, and traffic-related pollution have become serious problems.
People's daily choices can have an impact on the environment.
For example, we can use less plastic, save electricity, recycle more, and take public transport instead of driving alone.
These actions may look small, but they still matter.
Of course, individuals cannot solve all environmental problems alone.
Governments should make stricter rules to reduce pollution, and companies should take more social responsibility.
At the same time, ordinary people should build a more sustainable lifestyle.
Protecting the environment means helping to protect our future.

materials.title: Future Plans / Goals
materials.displayTitle: 18. Future Plans / Goals｜未来计划与目标
materials.passage: I have several goals for the future. One of my main goals is to improve my English, especially my speaking ability. I want to become more confident when speaking English, because it may give me more opportunities in work and life. Another important goal is to maintain a healthy lifestyle. As I get older, I realize that health is the foundation of everything. I want to exercise more regularly, eat better, and sleep earlier. These goals sound simple, but they require discipline and patience. In my opinion, long-term goals should be realistic and meaningful. It is important to break big goals into small steps. I don't want to rush. I prefer to make steady progress every day.
expressions: goals for the future：未来目标
maintain a healthy lifestyle：保持健康生活方式
the foundation of everything：一切的基础
exercise more regularly：更规律地运动
realistic and meaningful：现实且有意义
break big goals into small steps：把大目标拆成小步骤
replacements: improve my English → improve my health / improve my professional skills / improve my communication skills
speaking ability → writing ability / listening ability / leadership skills
maintain a healthy lifestyle → build a better routine / develop better habits
make steady progress → keep learning / take small actions / stay consistent

sentences.text: I have several goals for the future.
One of my main goals is to improve my English, especially my speaking ability.
I want to become more confident when speaking English, because it may give me more opportunities in work and life.
Another important goal is to maintain a healthy lifestyle.
As I get older, I realize that health is the foundation of everything.
I want to exercise more regularly, eat better, and sleep earlier.
These goals sound simple, but they require discipline and patience.
In my opinion, long-term goals should be realistic and meaningful.
It is important to break big goals into small steps.
I don't want to rush.
I prefer to make steady progress every day.
